name: Awareness Source
subtitle: Mindfulness breathing timer
description: Official AltStore source for Awareness reminder — a mindfulness timer that randomly blacks out your screen, forcing you to pause, breathe, and reset.

apps.name: Awareness reminder
apps.subtitle: Mindful breathing breaks
apps.localizedDescription:
Awareness randomly interrupts you with a full-screen blackout, forcing you to stop and breathe. Inspired by Vipassana meditation practice.

Features:
- Random breathing breaks at configurable intervals
- Daily contemplative practice cards with micro-tasks
- Home Screen widget with progress and one-tap breathing
- Apple Watch companion with haptics and complications
- Apple Health integration (Mindful Minutes)
- Call detection — skips breaks during phone/video calls
- Customizable: plain black, text, image, or looping video
- Bilingual: English and German

versions.localizedDescription: v3.11 — Skip breaks during phone/video calls (FaceTime, Zoom, Teams, WhatsApp). Skipped breaks don't count toward your stats.

privacy.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Awareness logs mindful breathing sessions to Apple Health as Mindful Minutes.
privacy.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Awareness reads Health data to display your mindfulness statistics.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Awareness lets you pick a custom image or video to display during breathing breaks.
